decks.notes: This Boros aggro deck focuses on fast and efficient creature damage, utilizing cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board. Additionally, the deck uses cards like Voice of Victory and Arena of Glory to pump up the creatures and provide additional combat tricks. The mana base includes fetch lands like Arid Mesa and Marsh Flats to ensure consistent mana access for the deck's aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively attack the opponent using low-cost creatures and burn spells, while also utilizing card draw and deck manipulation to maintain tempo and consistency. With a mix of efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, alongside powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. The inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration allows for card advantage and selection, ensuring that the deck can continue to apply pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on manipulating the graveyard to cascade into powerful creatures with Living End, while also utilizing alternative win conditions and disruptive spells to control the game. By cycling through cards and using cascade effects, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a sudden board presence and disrupt their game plan with counterspells and removal. The key strategy is to set up a favorable board state by efficiently cycling through cards and casting Living End to bring back high-value creatures from the graveyard, putting pressure on the opponent and closing out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of powerful Eldrazi creatures and artifact-based removal spells. By assembling UrzaTron lands, the deck aims to ramp up quickly and cast expensive threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Karn, the Great Creator. The inclusion of cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Glaring Fleshraker disrupts the opponent's game plan, while Ugin, the Eye of the Storms provides additional board control. With a mix of removal, disruption, and powerful threats, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast its opponents in a longer game.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on efficiently lowering the opponent's life total while maintaining a board presence with resilient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional sources of damage and support for the aggressive game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency and allows for a fast start to apply pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly with cards like Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Desperate Ritual. The goal is to chain together spells and create a storm count, eventually finishing off the opponent with a massive Grapeshot. Wrenn's Resolve can help protect key combo pieces, while Past in Flames allows for spells to be recast from the graveyard. The deck aims to create a fast and explosive win condition through a combination of mana generation and spellcasting.

This deck aims to control the game by utilizing the powerful UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up to large threats like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. It also includes a variety of Eldrazi creatures and support cards to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's resources with cards like Chalice of the Void and Kozilek's Command, ultimately overpowering them with powerful creatures and spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Mine, and Power Plant) to quickly ramp up and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck focuses on control elements like Kozilek's Command and Karn, the Great Creator to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own game plan. With plenty of mana acceleration and powerful threats, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and win through a combination of creature beatdown and disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly deploy threats like Hollow One and Nethergoyf while disrupting your opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize and Burning Inquiry. By playing aggressively and utilizing cards like Faithless Looting to fill your graveyard, you can power out strong creatures and overwhelm your opponent. Additionally, cards like Unholy Heat and Lightning Bolt provide removal options to control the board. The deck aims to be fast and efficient, putting pressure on your opponent early and maintaining that pressure throughout the game.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing artifacts and creatures to quickly build a strong board presence. The use of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal allow for quick mana acceleration while cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager provide additional value and synergy with artifacts. The main strategy revolves around efficiently utilizing artifacts to create a threatening battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Ultimately, the objective is to outpace and overpower the opponent through a combination of fast plays and powerful creatures.

The deck focuses on disrupting opponents with taxing effects while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly close out games. Teferi, Time Raveler and Arena of Glory provide additional disruption and protection for your creatures. Ephemerate and Solitude offer removal options while Consign to Memory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to control the board state and overwhelm opponents with its aggressive creatures and disruptive elements.

This deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Power Plant, and Tower) to generate massive amounts of mana quickly. It uses powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon provide additional control and removal options. Chalice of the Void and Dismember help to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and efficient mana generation.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's mana base and lock them down temporarily, while also generating card advantage through sacrificing lands and creatures. The goal is to set up a powerful combo using cards like Price of Freedom and Magmatic Hellkite to overwhelm the opponent and finish the game quickly. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Path to Exile and Wrath of the Skies to control the board and clear the way for the combo pieces to shine.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively attack the opponent with low cost creatures and burn spells, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Surgical Extraction. The deck aims to apply pressure early on and finish the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. With a focus on cheap spells and creatures, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent through efficient card advantage and tempo plays.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Persist and Unearth, creating a powerful combo. The deck also includes cards like Gran-Gran and Faithless Looting to help with card draw and filtering, as well as countermagic like Force of Negation to protect the combo pieces. By reanimating a creature like Archon of Cruelty or Emperor of Bones, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and synergy between them to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. It includes cards that assist in generating mana, card draw, and disruptive elements to control the game. By efficiently using artifacts like Mox Opal and Engineered Explosives alongside creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to efficiently generate threats on the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of Urza's Saga further enhances the artifact synergy and provides additional value throughout the game.
